description: Style NoteAn oriental fougere fragrance, dunhill London was launched in 2008. The main accords are vanilla, sweet and woody. The dry down is powdery and balmy.Product DetailsThe dominant notes in this fragrance are sandalwood, tonka bean, patchouli, musk, vanilla, jasmine, rose, red apple and geranium.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize100 ml
